mapper.sql: id, task_id, type, severity, confidence, title, file_path, start_line, end_line, endpoint, description, evidence, remediation, delta_status, fingerprint, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM finding WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM finding WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO finding (id, task_id, type, severity, confidence, title, file_path, start_line, end_line, endpoint, description, evidence, remediation, delta_status, fingerprint, created_at) VALUES
(#{finding.id}, #{finding.taskId}, #{finding.type}, #{finding.severity}, #{finding.confidence}, #{finding.title}, #{finding.filePath}, #{finding.startLine}, #{finding.endLine}, #{finding.endpoint}, #{finding.description}, #{finding.evidence}, #{finding.remediation}, #{finding.deltaStatus}, #{finding.fingerprint}, #{finding.createdAt})
